articles.title: HIGH-PERFORMING IMAGE RETRIEVAL API
articles.summary: Between Google Gemini and the latest release of OpenAI's GPT-4o, online search and discovery is fast becoming a multimodal affair. Users are looking beyond text and expecting the same high quality results for image search.

articles.title: SNAP LENSE STUDIO 5.0
articles.summary: Snap has released the GenAI suite in Lens Studio 5.0 - this is a great advancement and is massively useful for developing AR applications.

articles.title: INSTAGRAM LAUNCHING AN AI STUDIO
articles.summary: Instagram's new "AI Studio" lets creators develop AI chatbot versions of themselves. It is currently rolling out as an early test in the US.

articles.title: APPLE, MICROSOFT SHRINK AI MODELS TO IMPROVE THEM
LLM COMPILER
articles.summary: Meta has released two language models that can compile code to assembly and decompile to LLVM IR. They were trained on 546 Billion tokens of high-quality data then further instruction tuned. They are able to achieve 77% of optimized assembly performance and have 45% round trip disassembly performance.

articles.title: CRITICGPT
articles.summary: OpenAI has trained a model based on GPT-4 that can catch GPT-4 mistakes and help humans spot mistakes during the RLHF process.

articles.title: A BENCHMARK FOR ACTIVE LEARNING PIPELINES
articles.summary: ALPBench is a tool designed to standardize benchmarks for active learning query strategies.

articles.title: BRING INFERENCE CLOSER TO YOUR USERS
Need to deploy AI /ML at the edge? Deliver fast AI applications
articles.summary: with high throughput and ultra-low latency anywhere in the world with Gcore [12]. Automatically adjust resources based on demand (only pay for what you use), deploy and scale effortlessly, process data locally

articles.title: and securely. Get started or book a demo
FAL GIGAGAN UPSCALER
articles.summary: AuraSR is a super resolution image upscaler recently open sourced by FAL. It requires a single forward pass and can upscale by 4x even over repeated applications. AuraSR works well on generated images.

articles.title: 3D SEGMENTATION WITH INTERACTIVE GUIDANCE
articles.summary: To meet the growing demand for detailed 3D data, researchers have introduced Point-SAM, a transformer-based model for 3D segmentation.

articles.title: GENERATIVE INFORMATION RETRIEVAL
articles.summary: This survey delves into generative information retrieval (GenIR), a fresh take on finding information that moves away from traditional search methods to ones that create answers on the fly.

articles.title: ARE TECH-ENABLED VERTICAL ROLL-UPS THE FUTURE OR THE PAST?
articles.summary: Roll up strategies depend on the ability to drive operational efficiencies to create excess cash flows. The emergence of AI possibly presents a new lever that unlocks the rollup strategy to a new degree. Are Vertical/SMBs rollups the future? This post presents two opposing viewpoints on this question.

articles.title: GEMMA 2 MODELS
articles.summary: The Gemma 2 9B and 27B models are now available.

articles.title: LANGUAGE MODELS FOR MATERIALS SCIENCE
articles.summary: MatText is a suite of benchmarking tools and datasets designed to evaluate language models' performance in materials science.

articles.title: MAMBA 2 IMPLEMENTATION
articles.summary: A quick implementation of Mamba 2 that doesn't require associative scans

articles.title: DUST RAISES $16M SERIES A
articles.summary: One of the first chaining and agents companies of the modern era, Dust raised additional funding after passing $1m ARR.

articles.title: ELEVENLABS LAUNCHES ITS FIRST IOS APP
articles.summary: ElevenLabs has launched its first iOS app, "ElevenLabs Reader: AI Audio," designed to convert text files or web links into audio narration, allowing users to listen while on the go.
